member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCategoryRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for creating or updating asset category data.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCategoryResponseDto.AssetCategoryId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the asset category.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCategoryResponseDto.AssetCategoryName
member.summary: The name of the category (e.g., Laptop, Furniture).

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCategoryResponseDto.CreatedBy
member.summary: The user who created the category.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCategoryResponseDto.UpdatedBy
member.summary: The user who last updated the category, if applicable.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckInDetailsResponseDto
member.summary: Detailed view of an asset check-in including related entity information.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckInRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for recording asset check-in (return) data.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckInRequestDto.Notes
member.example: Returned in good condition, minor scratch on left side.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckInResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the details of an asset check-in transaction.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckoutDetailsDto
member.summary: Detailed DTO for asset checkout information.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckoutDetailsDto.Notes
member.example: Assigned to staff for field project use.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckoutDetailsDto.RoomLocationDescription
member.example: Room 204 - Left corner desk near window

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetCheckOutResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the details of an asset check-out transaction.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetDetailDto
member.summary: Represents the full, detailed profile of an asset including all relational data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetDetailResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a flat, detailed summary of an asset.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetDisposeResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the details of an asset disposal transaction.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetDto
member.summary: Represents the comprehensive data structure for an asset.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetEventHistoryDetailsResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a detailed historical record of changes, including full asset context.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetEventHistoryResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a historical record of changes made to an asset.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetImageResponseDto
member.summary: Represents an image associated with an asset.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetImageResponseDto.Photo
member.summary: The photo data represented as a Base64-encoded string.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetMaintenanceResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the details of an asset maintenance record.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetMaintenanceResponseDto.Details
member.example: Full system recalibration and sensor cleaning.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetRepairDetailResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the full details of an asset repair record.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.AssetRepairDetailResponseDto.Details
member.example: Replaced shattered digitizer and recalibrated touch sensors.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.MaintenanceStatusResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a possible status for an asset maintenance record.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.RepairStatusResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a possible status for an asset repair record.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.ScheduleRepairDetailResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the full, detailed view of a scheduled asset repair.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.ScheduleRepairDetailResponseDto.IsScheduleApproved
member.summary: Approval status: 0 = Pending, 1 = Approved, 2 = Rejected.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.ScheduleRepairResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the scheduled repair information for an asset.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Asset.ScheduleRepairResponseDto.IsScheduleApproved
member.summary: Approval status: 0 = Pending, 1 = Approved, 2 = Rejected.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Building.BuildingResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a building within a specific site location.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Floor.FloorResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a specific floor within a building.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteHeadRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for creating or updating site head data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteHeadResponseDto
member.summary: Response DTO for site head data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteHeadUpdateRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for updating site head data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteLocationRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for creating or updating site location data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteLocationResponseDto
member.summary: Response DTO for site location data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteLocationUpdateRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for updating site location data.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for creating or updating site/location data.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteRequestDto.SiteDescription
member.example: Main warehouse and distribution hub for the Ashanti Region.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a physical site or location in the asset tracking system.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Site.SiteResponseDto.SiteDescription
member.example: Main warehouse and distribution hub for the Ashanti Region.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Staff.StaffResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the personal and location details of a staff member.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.Staff.StaffResponseDto.RoomLocationDescription
member.example: Located near the IT helpdesk, East Wing.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.User.UserImageResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a Data Transfer Object for delivering user profile images.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.User.UserImageResponseDto.UserImageId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier associated with the user or image record.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.User.UserImageResponseDto.Photo
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary content of the user's photo.

member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Application.Common.Dtos.User.UserLoginResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a Data Transfer Object containing details for an external login provider response.
